description: Authored formula corrections, keyed by metric_uid OR registry canonical_id. Applied as the HIGHEST-priority core-formula source in harness.ingest.skeleton.resolve_core_formula (override > bc2_seed > registry_split > null). Use this for the cases formula_reconciliation flags as wrong/missing, where the chart-registry narration is messy and the BC_2 seed is absent. BC_2 stays a read-only snapshot; dc-kg is the system of record. Each entry: {core_formula, components?, scope_key?, note}.

metric:blended:marketing_spend.note: Blended marketing spend is the additive sum of channel spends (BC_2 ontology marketing-spend).

data-quality:schema_health.core_formula: Schema Health % = (Fresh Schemas + Acceptable Schemas) / Total Schemas * 100
data-quality:schema_health.note: Strip the threshold-definition lines (Fresh/Acceptable/Stale) from the registry bundle; keep the single core ratio.
